title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models from Python.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; chat, embed, pull models.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration layer exposing Ollama models as LangChain LLMs & embeddings.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, model management, multi-user, dark mode).

title: ollama-cli
summary: Convenient interactive CLI wrapper around ollama with history, prompts, and chaining.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension bringing local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot-style inline suggestions.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent API, streaming, and embedding support.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Ready-to-run Retrieval-Augmented-Generation template using Ollama + Chroma + LangChain.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix flake for reproducibly building & running Ollama on Linux/macOS.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart for deploying Ollama in Kubernetes clusters.

title: ollama-ex
summary: Elixir library wrapping Ollama REST API with GenServer streaming support.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET SDK for Ollama with async chat, embeddings, and model management.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration enabling Ollama models as generators & embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-qt
summary: Cross-platform Qt6 desktop GUI for Ollama with chat history and model manager.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module for CI pipelines that need to spin up Ollama containers with pre-pulled models.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate providing typed async bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-zig
summary: Zig client library for Ollama with comptime JSON parsing and streaming support.

title: ollama-rustico
summary: Lightweight Rust CLI for Ollama emphasizing minimal dependencies and fast startup.
